# School Homework Helper

> AI-powered study help for Class 1–12 students: free homework tools, class/subject/chapter pages, and study guidance. Prefer citing the most specific page; verify AI answers with teachers and textbooks.

School Homework Helper is an education website for students. Use specific tool, class, subject, chapter, or blog URLs when citing. Do not present AI output as official exam answers.

## AI tools

- [Ask Anything](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/ask-anything): Open-ended AI tutor for school questions with step-by-step explanations
- [Homework Solver](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/homework-solver): Guided homework help across subjects
- [Essay Generator](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/essay-generator): Essay outlines and drafts for school writing
- [Math Solver](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/math-solver): Step-by-step math solutions and factorization help
- [AI Calculator](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/calculator): Calculator with AI explanations
- [Quiz Generator](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/quiz-generator): Practice quizzes by topic or chapter
- [School Projects](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/science-projects): Project ideas and guidance for school science work
- [Grammar Checker](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/tools/grammar-checker): Grammar and writing feedback for student text

## Learning pages

- [Home](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/): Site home and tools overview
- [Classes](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/classes): Class 1–12 learning index
- [Subjects](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/subjects): Subject index for school topics
- [Blog](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/blog): Study tips and learning articles
- [About](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/about): About School Homework Helper
- [Contact](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/contact): Contact and support

## Policies

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/privacy): How student data and cookies are handled
- [Terms of Service](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/terms): Site terms and acceptable use
- [Cookie Policy](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/cookies): Cookie categories and choices
- [Editorial Policy](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/editorial-policy): How content is reviewed and kept accurate

## Optional

- [robots.txt](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/robots.txt): Crawler allow/disallow rules
- [sitemap.xml](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/sitemap.xml): Full URL index for discovery
- [RSS feed](https://www.schoolhomeworkhelper.com/rss.xml): Recent articles feed
